name: Cannaisseur Group Inc.
business: The Cannaisseur Group, Inc. has transitioned into a health and wellness company, selling health and wellness products including CBD-related products through its 51% owned subsidiary Atlanta CBD (d/b/a Inno Medicinals). Its only assets and operations consist of that interest, and it sells products online via innomedicinals.com to consumers aged 18 and older in states where legal.
sellsTo: States where hemp-derived CBD products are legal

exposures.sentence: The Company, however, has now transitioned into a health and wellness company, with the aim of promoting and selling health and wellness products, including CBD-related products.

The global digital health and wellness market size was valued at approximately USD 349.39 billion in 2024 and is expected to reach USD 1663.33 billion by 2033, growing at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of about 18.93% from 2025 to 2033 according to Business Research Insights.
